title: Install the Infinity data source plugin

blocks.content: The Infinity data source plugin is not installed by default. In this milestone, you search for the data source and install it.
To install the Infinity data source plugin, complete the following steps:
Sign in to your Grafana environment (for example, `mystack.grafana.net`).
From the navigation menu on the left, click **Connections > Add new connection**.
Enter `Infinity` in the search bar and press **Enter**.
The Infinity plugin comes pre-installed in Grafana Cloud. You'll see an **Add new data source** button instead of an **Install** button.
In the next milestone, you will add the Infinity data source to your Grafana Cloud instance.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Data source plugins for Grafana](https://grafana.com/grafana/plugins/data-source-plugins/)
- [Installing Infinity data source plugin](/docs/plugins/yesoreyeram-infinity-datasource/latest/setup/installation/)
